source_pr.title: server: fix sub query error in prepare statement
source_pr.body: When prepare a statement with sub queries by api, TiDB will throw "transaction future is not set". This pr fix it. PTAL @tiancaiamao @coocood

symptoms: "select a from multiexec where b = ? order by b") (new_session_test.go)
failure_signature: "select a from multiexec where b = ? order by b") (new_session_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: "select a from multiexec where b = ? order by b") (new_session_test.go)

files: executor/prepared_test.go, new_session_test.go, server/conn.go, server/conn_stmt.go, server/driver.go, server/driver_tidb.go, session.go, tidb_test.go, util/kvencoder/kv_encoder.go, util/testkit/testkit.go
